## Area

What feature, doc, or flow needs review?

## Sensitive Data

Could this touch private keys, private destinations, messages, router logs, contact graphs, or metadata?

## Boundary Question

What local-first or least-privilege boundary needs confirmation?

## Notes

Guaranteed anonymity is not promised. Full E2EE is not promised unless implemented and tested.
